title: Tales & Trails | Beijing: Where ancient legacy meets high tech
description: BEIJING, March 26, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- A news report from chinadaily.com.cn: Join China Daily journalist Erik Nilsson on a tour of Beijing to explore its timeless charm alongside a tech-powered future. A stroll around Beijing is a journey through time, where centuries-old heritage coexists with cutting-edge innovation. The Beijing Central Axis reveals the city's historical heart. At the Choc Choco Chocolate Museum, history takes the form of edible art. In Beijing E-Town, visitors experience the forefront of artificial intelligence, while the ancient Grand Canal continues to breathe new life into urbanization.

title: Humans and dogs — scientists find new proof of ancient bond
description: Findings suggest dogs provided companionship to early human communities Evidence shows dogs buried alongside humans indicating strong bond Details

title: The Inherent Evil of Fossil Fuels
